scripts.build: corepack pnpm generate:content && corepack pnpm -r build
scripts.dev: corepack pnpm generate:content && corepack pnpm --filter @ddm/protocol build && corepack pnpm --filter @ddm/content build && corepack pnpm --filter @ddm/engine build && corepack pnpm --parallel --filter @ddm/server --filter @ddm/web dev
scripts.test: corepack pnpm generate:content && corepack pnpm -r test
